_comment: Cache for the code-health-auditor skill (#234). Keyed by kind:path:symbol. Seeded with the intentional allowlist so those findings are never filed; genuine dead code is discovered and filed by the first manual run of the skill. Do not edit by hand beyond the allowlist; the skill maintains it.
